title: Debug Crosshair
description: A client side mod that allows you to show or hide the F3 Crosshair without showing all the other information when hitting f3.
body: A simple mod that allows you to show or hide the F3 Crosshair without showing all the other information when hitting f3. You can configure the crosshair, show your coordinates under the crosshair and even send your coordinates to the chat via keybinds.
